mnemonics: AR(p) - Always Remember the Past p lags
keyPoints: An AR(p) process regresses a variable on its own past p values.
The process is stationary if the roots of its characteristic equation lie outside the unit circle.
The Yule-Walker equations can be used to estimate the parameters of an AR process.
commonMistakes: Assuming all AR processes are stationary without checking the roots of the characteristic equation.
Confusing the order p (number of lags) with the coefficients (φ) of the model.
